events.title: Referral received
events.detail: New referral from Saint Francis Memorial for client 1078. Starting intake pipeline.

events.title: Client profile structured
events.detail: Diet orders: diabetic, renal. Allergies: none. Sodium ceiling 600 mg/meal, carbs 45–60 g/meal. Prefers Mexican; dislikes nothing noted. Cooking ability: microwave. 7 meals/week, zone Sunset.

events.title: Dispatching Clinical Matching Agent
events.detail: Hard constraint hierarchy locked: allergens → sodium → carbs → diet-order tags. Exclusion rules, never scoring penalties.

events.title: Scanning inventory
events.detail: Scoring all 80 meals against hard constraints, then ranking survivors by cuisine preference and dislike avoidance.

events.title: Rejected: Calabacitas con Pollo
events.detail: Excluded — carbs: 43 g outside 45–60 g range.

events.title: Rejected: Turkey Picadillo with Rice
events.detail: Excluded — diet order 'renal': meal lacks 'renal-friendly' tag.

events.title: Matched: Overnight Oats with Berries
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 300/600 mg ✓, carbs 55 g (target 45–60) ✓.

events.title: Matched: Winter Melon Soup with Chicken and Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 354/600 mg ✓, carbs 45 g (target 45–60) ✓.

events.title: Matched: Chicken Congee with Scallions
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 364/600 mg ✓, carbs 49 g (target 45–60) ✓.

events.title: Route assigned
events.detail: Client 1078 added to route R-SUNS-1 (Sunset), delivery 2026-07-21, window 10:00–12:00. Cold chain OK.

events.title: Plan complete
events.detail: Client 1078: 7 compliant meal(s) at fallback level 0. 0 hard-constraint violations.
